title: BEM-867 queue processor diag
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox.json')
script = Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py')
runner = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
script_text = script.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if script.exists() else ''
runner_text = runner.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
queue_text = queue.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if queue.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'queue_exists': queue.exists(),
    'script_exists': script.exists(),
    'runner_exists': runner.exists(),
    'runner_has_after_commit_step': 'Process workflow dispatch queue after commit' in runner_text,
    'runner_calls_script': 'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in runner_text,
    'script_has_queue_path': 'workflow_dispatch_queue' in script_text,
    'script_has_gh_workflow': 'gh' in script_text and 'workflow' in script_text and 'run' in script_text,
    'queue_mentions_claude_yml': 'claude.yml' in queue_text,
}
status = 'PROCESSOR_WIRED_QUEUE_PENDING' if all(checks.values()) else 'PROCESSOR_NOT_WIRED'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_DIAG_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 queue processor diag\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n\nQueue text:\n' + queue_text[:2000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 queue processor diag: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
